name: Banana Bread IV
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, stir together the whole wheat flour, baking powder, and baking soda.
2. In another bowl, combine the sugar and applesauce; add the egg whites and skim milk, beating until smooth.
3. Add the flour mixture alternately with the mashed bananas to the applesauce mixture.
4. Pour the batter into a Pam-sprayed 9x5x4-inch loaf tin.
5. Bake for 60 minutes at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
6. If desired, bake in smaller pans for less time.
7. Cool in the pan for 10 minutes.
8. Remove from the pan and place on a wire rack.
9. Makes 1 loaf with approximately 0.5 grams of fat per serving.
